description_long: This is a cylindrical amber plastic prescription medicine bottle with a wide, ribbed white child-resistant cap. The bottle features a detailed pharmacy label, including patient information, medication instructions, and a barcode, all printed in black and red text on a white background. The label is affixed to the side of the bottle, covering a significant portion of its surface, and includes branding from Walgreens. The amber color of the bottle is designed to protect the contents from light exposure, while the opaque white cap ensures the bottle is securely closed. The bottle appears empty or partially filled, as the contents are not visible through the translucent plastic. The overall design is typical of prescription medication containers found in pharmacies across urban environments.
description: Amber plastic prescription bottle with a ribbed white child-resistant cap and a detailed pharmacy label, including Walgreens branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pharmacy label with patient and medication details, barcode, and Walgreens branding clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cylindrical shape, ribbed cap, and partial label visibility.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the wide, ribbed white cap, with the amber bottle body mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the plain amber plastic surface with the label partially visible on the side.
